summary: Iteration 43 - Tested Resend email integration for forgot-password flow. All 6 backend tests passed, all frontend UI tests passed. Email users (traore_eric@yahoo.fr) see 'Email envoye' confirmation without simulation code. Phone users (+2250709005301) see 'Mode Simulation SMS' amber box with simulation code. Login regression tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: email_service.py correctly uses Resend API with fallback to MOCK mode when API key missing
VERIFIED: auth.py forgot-password endpoint correctly returns email_sent:true when real email sent, simulation_code only when email not sent
VERIFIED: ForgotPassword.jsx correctly handles email_sent flag vs simulation_code - shows appropriate UI for each
NOTE: Rate limit of 3/minute on forgot-password is working correctly (HTTP 429 when exceeded)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 43 verified Resend email integration for forgot-password. Key findings: 1) traore_eric@yahoo.fr receives real email (email_sent:true, no simulation_code). 2) Phone users like +2250709005301 get simulation_code since SMS is mocked. 3) Non-verified Resend emails (like admin klenakan.eric@gmail.com) fallback to simulation_code. 4) Rate limit of 3/minute is active - wait before testing multiple forgot-password requests.

mocked_api_note.Orange SMS: FULLY MOCKED - simulation_code returned for phone users
mocked_api_note.Resend Email: TEST MODE - only traore_eric@yahoo.fr can receive real emails, other emails fallback to simulation_code

Web forgot-password with email shows 'Em.note: Green confirmation box displayed, no simulation code

Web forgot-password with phone shows 'Mo.note: Amber box with simulation code 824860 displayed
